subject: so-minitoring po startup issue
commit_message:
so-minitoring po startup issue

so-monitoring pod doesn't start completely.
This issue has been addressed here

Change-Id: Iab0d8fd3f1a7b9b000d2eac3968fefc07b5b2230
Issue-ID: SO-1138
Signed-off-by: Ramesh Parthasarathy(rp6768)<ramesh.parthasarathy@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/929/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/929

Patch Set 1:

The issue of so-monitoring was traced to be a mismatch between the application port and the container port. So I changed all the override files to match application port with the container port in the values file. so monitoring pod seems to work correct now. Please review.
